news.title: Amsterdam verhoogt toeristenbelasting stapsgewijs naar 20 procent - hospitality-management.nl
news.summary:
# Summary

Amsterdam is gradually increasing its tourist tax up to 20 percent, which will significantly impact accommodation costs for visitors to the city. While this article doesn't focus on a specific restaurant, the tax increase affects the overall hospitality sector, including hotels and lodging where tourists stay while dining out. Visitors should be aware that their accommodation expenses will rise substantially over time, potentially affecting their total travel budget for food and activities in Amsterdam.

news.title: Groep van 33 personen daagt niet op bij restaurant De Bomma: "Menu stond klaar, maar ze stuurden hun kat" - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

A group of 33 people failed to show up for their reservation at restaurant De Bomma, leaving the kitchen with prepared meals that went to waste; instead of canceling, the group allegedly sent a cat to the restaurant as a joke or prank. This is a cautionary tale for visitors to the city about the importance of honoring restaurant reservations, as no-shows can waste food and impact small businesses' operations.

While the article doesn't specify which restaurant the crab came from, this quirky incident highlights the vibrant food scene in Antwerp's Chinese neighborhood. news.title: Groep van 33 personen daagt niet op bij restaurant De Bomma: "Menu stond klaar, maar ze stuurden hun kat" - Nieuwsblad
news.summary:
# Summary

A group of 33 people failed to show up for their reservation at Belgian restaurant De Bomma, leaving the kitchen and staff disappointed after preparing meals—and the only thing that arrived was their cat. This no-show is significant for visitors because it highlights the importance of honoring restaurant reservations, especially for large parties, as restaurants like De Bomma lose revenue and waste prepared food when diners don't appear or cancel. The incident serves as a reminder that restaurants rely on accurate headcount confirmations to manage their operations and resources effectively.
